title: Farm Animals Song for Toddlers | Kids Cartoon #shorts
description:
MOO MOO! Benny wakes up on the sunny farm!
Sing animal sounds with Benny, cow, duck, sheep, and chick.
Toddlers practice moo, quack, baa, and peep in a fun farm song.
Kid-safe cartoon music for ages 2-8 in American English.
#shorts #kidssongs #preschool #toddler
